philosophy: Five repos. Ship-quality only. Each repo has a clear mission, stack, and demo.

repos.name: akhilvydyula
repos.description: GitHub profile for Akhil Vydyula: Forward Deployment Engineer shipping enterprise data, AI, and lakehouse platforms to production.
highlights: 7 years enterprise data & AI delivery (BFSI, consulting, insurance)
300+ table lakehouse migrations, Gen AI in regulated environments
Mission-driven README: first principles, metrics, ship velocity

repos.name: oss-goalos-ai
repos.tagline: Turn screen time into goal time
repos.description: Open-source AI productivity OS — web demo + Android app. Goal scoring, AI coach, intent checks, focus sprints. Local-first.
highlights: Live web demo + native Android companion
AI coaching, focus sprints, screen-time-to-goal alignment
MIT licensed, CI/CD, architecture & deployment docs

repos.name: dataflow-ai
repos.description: AI-powered ETL platform: describe pipelines in plain English, generate deployable code for AWS/GCP/Azure. React + FastAPI + LLM.
highlights: Multi-cloud deploy, real-time monitoring, code editor
Monorepo: React 18 frontend, FastAPI backend, Docker, Supabase

repos.name: interview-optimizer-pro
repos.tagline: AI interview prep & job search platform
repos.description: Full-stack AI platform for mock interviews, job search, subscriptions, and instructor/student LMS workflows. React + Supabase.
highlights: Mock interviews, dashboard analytics, job search module
Vite + React + shadcn/ui + TanStack Query + Supabase

repos.name: oss-data-driven-decision-making
repos.description: Curated open-source collection of data science resources, guides, and links for evidence-based decision making in the public sector.
highlights: Data science methodology & R overview resources
